name: the-brain
description: Second AI brain and knowledge system for Claude Code and Claude Cowork: three sub-brains (wiki, pm, planner), connector-aware skills, and a raw archive for source materials.

brain_path.title: Brain directory
brain_path.description: Path to your Brain folder (created by /the-brain:newbrain). Lets /the-brain:log, /the-brain:myday, /the-brain:standup, and /the-brain:prep work from any directory. Claude Code only — Claude Cowork users do not need this and can ignore it.
